Broadway box office surpasses pre-pandemic holiday-week gross; for the week ending Dec.
Calendar year 2024 ended on a high for Broadway, with box office records broken across several shows during week 32 of the 2024-2025 season.
29, 2019’s holiday week gross of $55,765,408 and marks Broadway’s second-highest grossing week on record, landing within striking distance of the highest-grossing week, the week ending Dec."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/business/business-news/wicked-highest-grossing-week-in-broadway-history-1236097340/","title":"Wicked Grosses $5 Million on Broadway, Sets New Record","content":"In addition to Wicked, several other productions played nine performances last week, including The Lion King, which brought in $4.2 million; Aladdin, with $2.81 million; and The Great Gatsby, with $2.62 million, breaking the box office record for nine shows at the Broadway Theatre.
The musical brought in $280,095 for the single performance.
Overall, the 2024-25 season is up by more than 16 percent compared to last season and stands to bring in more over the remaining holiday week."},{"url":"https://www.guinnessworldrecords.com/world-records/106558-highest-single-week-box-office-gross-on-broadway","title":"Highest single-week box-office gross on Broadway | Guinness World Records","content":"Wicked, with music, lyrics and book by Stephen Schwartz and Winnie Holzman (both USA), grossed $5,037,392 (£4 m) in the seven days ending 29 December 2024, according to broadwayworld.com.
In this week, the cast performed nine shows to a total of 17,334 people, who paid an average of $290.61 (£230.99) per seat.
Since 2003, Wicked has racked up a cumulative gross of $1,759,287,951 (£1.286 bn) from 8,440 performances, as of 3 July 2025.

Average $291 12","score":0.9094659,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/Broadway/comments/1hqlpoj/wicked_made_5m_on_broadway_for_week_ending_122924","title":"Wicked made $5m on Broadway for week ending 12/29/24 ...","content":"Wicked had 9 shows and made $5.037m, breaking its previous 9 show record of $4.003m from the week ending 12/31/23.","score":0.8576849,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2024/11/wicked-box-office-record-broadway-musical-1236190290","title":"'Wicked' Is Highest Grossing Broadway Musical Movie at U.S. Box Office","content":"### ‘The Invite’ Dines Out At No. 6 For Weekend In Solid National Expansion; ‘Reading Lolita in Tehran’ At The Angelika – Specialty Box Office. # ‘Wicked’ Becomes Highest Grossing Movie Based On Broadway Musical At Domestic Box Office. During the course of a record Thanksgiving weekend, Universal’s ***Wicked: Part One*** has become the highest grossing movie ever at the domestic box office based on a Broadway musical. *Wicked* was always perceived to be chiefly domestic-driven at the B.O. With a running time of two hours and 40 minutes to *Moana 2*‘s 100 minutes, some box office sources believed that *Wicked* would hit a buzzsaw in the Dwayne Johnson-Auli’i Cravalho sequel, but the two heavy female demo movies (70%-plus) co-existed wonderfully. WhileDisney’s *Moana 2* is notching the best five-day opening of all time and Thanksgiving with $215M-$220M, *Wicked* with a projected $118M is the third best over the Wednesday-Sunday holiday behind *Moana 2* and Disney’s 2019 *Frozen 2*($125M holiday holdover take).","score":0.7892503,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reddit.com/r/boxoffice/comments/1hug4ca/broadway_grosses_analysis_wicked_is_1st_show_ever","title":"Broadway Grosses Analysis: Wicked Is 1st Show Ever to Gross $5 Million","content":"Broadway Grosses Analysis: Wicked Is 1st Show Ever to Gross $5 Million\nr/boxoffice - 135 upvotes, 42 comments\nAn interesting bit of box office (though not film box office) news that came out of the Holiday time frame. Wicked on Broadway became the first show ever to gross over $5 million in a single week. This milestone is believed to be attributed to the success of the movie and the movie’s very large marketing campaign. The average ticket price to see Wicked that week was $290.61. This goes to show how strong ancillary can be for a movie. On top of being the box office success in and of itself, the movie is going to continue paying dividends to Universal for years to come thanks to the heightened awareness of the stage show brought by the movie. A similar success can be linked to the many stage productions of Disney’s catalogue. In case you didn’t know, the Wicked stage show is the single highest grossing piece of entertainment in Universal’s entire catalogue.","score":0.7077487,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/business/business-news/wicked-highest-grossing-week-in-broadway-history-1236097340","title":"Wicked Grosses $5 Million on Broadway, Sets New Record","content":"The musical brought in $5 million in the lucrative holiday week. *Wicked* brought in a staggering $5 million last week, marking the highest weekly gross in history for any Broadway show. The musical brought in $2 million more than the prior week and had an average ticket price of $290.61. The week between Christmas and New Year’s is also typically one of the highest grossing for many shows in the industry. In addition to *Wicked,* several other productions played nine performances last week, including *The Lion King,* which brought in $4.2 million; *Aladdin,* with $2.81 million; and *The Great Gatsby*, with $2.62 million, breaking the box office record for nine shows at the Broadway Theatre. *Hamilton* played an eight-show week and still had the third-highest gross in the industry, with $2.93 million. *Elf The Musical* also broke the box office record at the Marquis Theatre, with a gross of $2.2 million.","score":0.7036111,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.75,"request_id":"5f0ec201-18c8-42b1-80ee-c9db9b4839da"}
